'''Kich''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|hot]] terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with no [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. It was located in the [[Rannon system/Legends|Rannon system]],<ref name="WbC" /> a part of the [[Instrop sector/Legends|Instrop sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet occupied the second closest [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] to its [[Star/Legends|star]], the [[Color/Legends|yellow-white]] [[Rannon (star)|Rannon]].<ref name="WbC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kich was first mentioned in the [[1993]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], which was written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]].<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Rannon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Kich, in grid square T-17.<ref name="TEA" />
